title: lithocarpus thomsonii
intro: Lithocarpus thomsonii, also known as the Himalayan Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against cardiovascular diseases. Lithocarpus thomsonii is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
